meals.label: Meal A
meals.name: Teriyaki Chicken Tacos with Creamy Sesame Cucumbers
ings: ⅓ cup + ¼ cup teriyaki sauce (divided)
Creamy Sesame Cucumbers: 1 large English cucumber (or 3–4 Persian), thinly sliced
1 cup fresh herbs (cilantro, green onions, and/or mint)
steps: Season chicken thighs with salt and pepper. Place in Instant Pot and add ⅓ cup teriyaki sauce. Toss to coat. Pressure cook on HIGH for 10 minutes.
While chicken cooks, thinly slice cucumbers. Whisk together yogurt, mayo, rice vinegar, sweet chili sauce, sesame oil, and salt. Toss with cucumbers and fresh herbs. Set aside.
Natural or quick release the Instant Pot. Remove chicken and shred. Spread on a foil-lined baking sheet. Drizzle with remaining ¼ cup teriyaki sauce and 2 tbsp sweet chili sauce, toss to coat.
Broil 3–6 minutes until chicken is caramelized and slightly crispy at the edges.
Warm tortillas. Layer each with crispy teriyaki chicken, creamy sesame cucumbers, sliced avocado, and a drizzle of extra dressing. Top with crushed peanuts and sesame seeds.
meals.note: 💡 No Instant Pot? Crockpot on high 2.5–3.5 hrs or low 4–5 hrs, then shred and broil. The broil step is key — don't skip it.

meals.label: Meal B
meals.name: Lemon Dill Salmon with Roasted Broccoli & Brown Rice
ings: 1 lemon, half sliced thin, half for juice
2 pouches microwaveable brown rice (8.5 oz each)
Optional: lemon zest, fresh dill, flaky salt to finish
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F. Line a large sheet pan with foil.
Toss broccoli florets with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on the sheet pan. Roast 10 minutes.
Pat salmon dry. Rub with olive oil, garlic powder, dill, salt, and pepper. Place on the sheet pan alongside the broccoli. Lay lemon slices on top of each fillet.
Roast 12–14 minutes until salmon flakes easily and broccoli edges are lightly charred.
Microwave brown rice pouches per package directions (about 90 seconds). Fluff and serve.
Squeeze fresh lemon over everything before serving. Finish with a pinch of flaky salt if you have it.
meals.note: 💡 The lemon slices on top perfume the fish as it roasts. If fillets are thick (over 1 inch), add 2 minutes. Broccoli should be in a single layer for good char — use two pans if needed.

meals.label: Meal C
meals.name: Sheet Pan Honey Mustard Chicken with Potatoes & Green Beans
ings: 1 tbsp whole grain mustard (or extra Dijon)
steps: Preheat oven to 425°F. Whisk together all honey mustard sauce ingredients in a bowl. Set aside.
Toss halved baby potatoes with olive oil, salt, pepper, garlic powder, and paprika. Spread on a large sheet pan in a single layer. Roast 15 minutes.

Season chicken thighs all over with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and paprika. Remove pan from oven. Push potatoes to the sides and add chicken thighs skin-side up in the center. Brush generously with honey mustard sauce.
Return to oven and roast 15 more minutes.
Add green beans to the pan, tossing with any remaining sauce and pan juices. Roast 12–15 more minutes until chicken reaches 165°F and skin is golden and caramelized.
Rest chicken 5 minutes. Drizzle pan juices over everything before serving.
meals.note: 💡 The staggered timing — potatoes first, then chicken, then green beans — is the key to everything cooking perfectly together. Don't crowd the pan.

meals.label: Meal A
meals.name: Slow Cooker Chili
meals.meta: ~15 min prep · 6 hrs slow cooker · Serves 8
ings: 2 cans diced tomatoes with mild green chilies
Chili powder, cumin, paprika, cocoa, coriander, sugar
Toppings: cheddar, sour cream, green onions
steps: Sauté onion and garlic, transfer to slow cooker.
Brown beef, drain, add to slow cooker.
Add all remaining ingredients. Cook LOW 5–6 hrs.
Stir in beans, heat 2 min. Serve with toppings.

meals.label: Meal B
meals.name: Butter Cauliflower
ings: Olive oil, lemon juice, cornstarch, spices
Butter, onion, garlic, ginger, tomato paste
Tomato sauce, vegetable broth, heavy cream
steps: Sear cauliflower, toss in cornstarch mixture, cook again.
Sauté aromatics, build sauce with tomato and broth.
Stir in cream, return cauliflower, simmer 15 min.
Serve over rice with cilantro and yogurt.

meals.label: Meal C
meals.name: Turkey & Veggie Bolognese over Casarecce
ings: Tomato paste, crushed tomatoes, tomato puree
steps: Sauté onion and garlic. Brown turkey.
Add zucchini and mushrooms. Stir in tomato paste.
Add tomatoes, simmer 30–35 min.
Cook pasta, toss with sauce. Serve with Parmesan.
